description:
Many queries do repeated full scans of deps (`deps_from`, `compute_blocked_by`, cycle detection, validation). Fine at 200 issues, painful at 20k.

**Files:** src/core/state.rs, src/daemon/query_executor.rs, src/daemon/executor.rs
design:
**In-memory only** — indexes live in `RepoState`, never persisted to deps.jsonl.

**Rebuild on load:** When daemon starts or merges from git, iterate deps once to build:
```rust
struct DepIndexes {
    out_edges: BTreeMap<BeadId, Vec<(BeadId, DepKind)>>,  // from -> [(to, kind)]
    in_edges: BTreeMap<BeadId, Vec<(BeadId, DepKind)>>,   // to -> [(from, kind)]
}
```

**Incremental update:** In `apply_add_dep` / `apply_remove_dep`, push/remove from both maps.

**Functions to change:**
- `deps_from()` (state.rs:300) → lookup `out_edges[id]`
- `deps_to()` (state.rs:309) → lookup `in_edges[id]`  
- `compute_blocked_by()` (query_executor.rs:707) → iterate `in_edges` filtered by kind
- `would_create_cycle()` (executor.rs:1073) → BFS uses `out_edges` directly

Complexity drops from O(all deps) to O(neighbors per hop).
title: Add derived indexes to avoid full dep scans

closed_reason: Reduced label add/remove tail latency via server loop hotpath changes (no inline WAL checkpoint on request/repl/git branches) and added p95/p99 benchmark + guardrail evidence in tmp/perf/hotpaths-20260212-161756.
description:
**Problem**
In hotpath benchmark runs, label mutation workflow (`label add` + `label remove`) shows significant tail latency spikes (example: mean ~43ms, max ~82ms) while most other write workflows are materially lower and tighter.

**Design**
Profile label mutation path under daemon metrics + traces to identify whether spikes are due to WAL fsync contention, checkpoint scheduling overlap, or extra query/render fanout. Add instrumentation if needed to separate queueing vs execution time.

**Acceptance**
- [ ] Repro script captures label mutation p50/p95/max with stable methodology
- [ ] Root cause identified with evidence (metrics/logs)
- [ ] Targeted fix reduces tail latency variance without correctness regressions
- [ ] Regression check added to perf harness/docs

**Files**
- scripts/profile-hotpaths.sh
- crates/beads-rs/src/daemon/*
- crates/beads-cli/src/commands/label.rs
title: Investigate label add/remove write tail-latency spikes in hotpath benchmark
